personality: Commanding, vigilant, burdened by duty. Speaks with military precision and wary authority.

greetingPool.text: Hold, traveller. State your business in these parts.
The roads grow more dangerous by the day. Watch yourself out there.
We keep the peace here. If you've nothing to hide, you've nothing to fear.

idlePool.text: Two patrols overdue and supplies running thin. I need more men, not more problems.
The night watch reports movement in the eastern wood. I do not like it one bit.
